name: proposed
format: 16-bit unsigned, little-endian, row-major (N->S rows, W->E cols)

unreal_landscape.z_scale_note: Unreal Z 'scale' 100 maps the full 0..65535 raw to 512 m. To honour NAVD88 ft, set landscape Z scale = 4.397086 (so 65535 -> 22.513 m span), Z offset = 17929.2 cm.

WARNING: planning-grade (2015 USGS LiDAR + supplement) - not a survey
